overall.description: Gameplay footage from a stealth video game showing a bald protagonist in a black shirt exploring a modern commercial restaurant kitchen. The character moves through various functional areas including an exhibition cooking station with hanging copper pots, narrow service corridors with refrigeration, a spacious prep kitchen with ornate windows, and storage rooms.

scene_state.functional_zone: open exhibition kitchen with hanging copper cookware

events.description: character turns from stove area to walk along the food preparation counter

agents.ego_description: walking through the exhibition kitchen, observing the hanging copper pots and food preparation stations

entered.detail: large copper cooking pots suspended from ceiling rack
professional gas range with multiple burners and oven
long counter with various ingredients and cooking utensils
dark gray tiled backsplash behind cooking equipment

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a modern exhibition kitchen with hanging copper pots and a large stainless steel stove. The character walks along the food preparation counter, passing various cooking ingredients and utensils arranged on the surface. The space is well-lit with a mix of natural light from the rear windows and overhead artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow back corridor with commercial refrigeration

events.description: exits main kitchen into narrow back corridor with commercial refrigerators

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow service corridor past glass-door refrigeration units

entered.detail: tall glass-door refrigerators containing beverages and ingredients
industrial metal racks holding kitchen supplies and equipment
large metal double doors leading to walk-in freezer unit

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the open kitchen into a narrow service corridor lined with commercial refrigeration units on the left and metal shelving on the right. The lighting becomes more artificial and enclosed as the character progresses toward the back of house area.

scene_state.functional_zone: large prep kitchen with ornate windows and multiple stations

events.description: enters spacious prep kitchen with natural light from ornate metal windows
approaches industrial dishwashing station at the end of the prep area

agents.ego_description: walking through the large prep kitchen, passing a chef working at a station

notable_agents.action: chef in white uniform working at meat preparation station

entered.detail: decorative metal-framed windows allowing natural light into the space
large stainless steel tables for food preparation with various ingredients
industrial sink and dishwashing equipment with plate racks

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a spacious prep kitchen with ornate metal-framed windows allowing natural light to filter in. The character walks past a chef working at a preparation station and continues toward the dishwashing area, passing large stainless steel prep tables and industrial mixing equipment.

scene_state.functional_zone: dry storage room and dishwashing area

events.description: enters dry storage room with metal shelving and supply crates
exits storage room back into main kitchen corridor

agents.ego_description: entering the storage room to survey supplies, then turning back into the kitchen corridor

entered.detail: tall metal shelving units stocked with dry goods and supplies
stacked plastic and wooden crates containing produce and ingredients
large industrial freezer with metal doors for bulk storage

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow dry storage room filled with metal shelving units and stacked supply crates. After a brief survey of the area, the character exits back into the kitchen corridor, passing the walk-in freezer unit and returning toward the main kitchen area.

scene_state.functional_zone: main kitchen corridor with plate storage and service areas

events.description: opens double doors with portholes to check adjacent room, then closes them and continues

agents.ego_description: walking through the kitchen corridor and interacting with double doors to check the storage area beyond

entered.detail: tall wooden shelving units holding stacks of white plates and dishes
metal double doors with circular porthole windows leading to back area

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character walking through the main kitchen corridor lined with plate storage racks. The character approaches a set of double doors with porthole windows, opens them to check the adjacent storage area, then closes the doors and continues down the corridor past stainless steel counters and kitchen equipment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a professional restaurant kitchen, transitioning from a bright exhibition area into the enclosed, functional depths of the back-of-house service zones. It begins in a well-lit exhibition kitchen, gliding past hanging copper pots and a stainless steel stove along a counter of ingredients. As the character moves forward, the open space tightens into a narrow service corridor lined with refrigeration units and metal shelving under artificial light, before expanding again into a spacious prep kitchen where natural light filters through ornate metal-framed windows. The camera then pushes into a cramped dry storage room filled with supply crates before retreating back through the corridor past a walk-in freezer. Finally, the movement continues down a hallway of plate storage racks, pausing briefly at a set of double doors with porthole windows before proceeding past the remaining stainless steel equipment.
